description_long: This object is a large, cube-shaped parcel with a beige exterior featuring a repeating geometric pattern reminiscent of traditional Indian motifs. Two sides of the parcel display detailed printed information, including product details, care instructions, and branding for 'India Circus by Krsnaa Mehta.' The top surface is solid black, divided into four quadrants by thin beige lines, giving it a distinct, compartmentalized appearance. The parcel appears to be made of a fabric or synthetic material, likely polyester, and is filled with lightweight beans, as indicated by the labeling. The overall construction suggests it is a pouffe or soft parcel, designed to be both decorative and functional. The object is visually striking due to its patterned sides and clear, legible text.
description: A large, patterned beige parcel with black top and detailed product information on two sides, branded as 'India Circus by Krsnaa Mehta.' The object has a soft, fabric-like exterior and a cubic form.
description_view_0: This view shows the front side with detailed product information, branding, and care instructions printed in black on a beige patterned background.
description_view_1: This side displays only the beige geometric pattern, with no text or branding, emphasizing the decorative motif.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this side also features product information and branding, but the text layout may differ slightly.
description_view_3: This view mirrors view 1, showing only the beige patterned surface without any text or branding.
